items.claim: Delgado has questionable durability because he was dropped by a low-level opponent in a previous fight.
items.quote: He gets like dropped in the first round by some like absolute jabroni scrub. Um, so I'm not convinced on like Delgado's durability.

items.claim: Bashie is likely to secure early takedowns against Delgado.
items.quote: I think Bashie's going to get takedowns early.

items.claim: Leosani has poor takedown defense and a tendency to accept being on his back.
items.quote: this le he likes being on his back his takedown defense isn't great

items.claim: Co is a clean, concise, and reliable fighter.
items.quote: what I see on the other side with Co is like very clean, concise, and reliable fighter.

items.claim: Co has elite positional control and takedowns.
items.quote: we've seen kind of over and over his positional control when he gets to top control and his takedowns are pretty elite.
